specific_question: What percentage of hot meat and seafood meal orders in Toronto received high customer rating scores (at least 4 out of 5) in 2025?
answer: Over 94% of hot meat and seafood orders in Toronto received high customer rating scores in 2025, which is an increase of over 6 percentage points as compared with 2024.
